violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Chic-Fil-A floors need cleaning in kitchen--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Chic-Fil-A tiles in kitchen were cracked/missing
